sharedLayouts.css: /* Custom layout styles for a typical artist portfolio */ .poff-default-layout { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } /* Header Styling */ .poff-default-layout__header { background-color: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding: 20px 40px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1000; } .poff-default-layout__content { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; max-width: 1200px; margin: auto; } .poff-default-layout__logo { font-size: 1.8em; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: -1px; cursor: pointer; } /* Navigation Styling */ .poff-default-layout__nav ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; gap: 30px; } .poff-default-layout__nav li a { text-decoration: none; color: #333; font-size: 1em; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .poff-default-layout__nav li a:hover { color: #888; /* Subtle hover effect */ } /* Main Content Area */ .poff-default-layout__main { flex-grow: 1; padding: 40px 20px; max-width: 1200px; margin: auto; }
sharedLayouts.sectionTemplate:

generative art ~ 2004/2006 /records ~1min/ Code: realbasic /

sharedLayouts.css: /* Custom layout styles for a typical artist portfolio */ .poff-default-layout { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } /* Header Styling */ .poff-default-layout__header { background-color: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding: 20px 40px; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .poff-default-layout__content { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; max-width: 1200px; margin: auto; } .poff-default-layout__logo { font-size: 1.8em; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: -1px; cursor: pointer; } /* Navigation Styling */ .poff-default-layout__nav ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; gap: 30px; } .poff-default-layout__nav li a { text-decoration: none; color: #333; font-size: 1em; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .poff-default-layout__nav li a:hover { color: #888; /* Subtle hover effect */ } /* Main Content Area */ .poff-default-layout__main { flex-grow: 1; padding: 40px 20px; max-width: 1200px; margin: auto; } /* Thumbnail Preview */ .thumbnail-preview { margin-top: 20px; } .thumbnail-preview img { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px; }
